regional_cost_note: Plumbers in New Plymouth typically charge $85–$125/hr. Taranaki rates are comparable to Waikato. Emergency callouts add $70–$130.

businesses.name: Allrounder Plumbing Taranaki Limited
businesses.known_for: Professional, friendly plumbing, gas services and drainlaying with 20 years experience; handles renovations, new homes and maintenance.

businesses.name: How Good Plumbing Ltd
businesses.known_for: Plumbing, gas services, kitchens and bathrooms, roofing, heating and drainlaying; handles leaking taps through to bathroom renovations and gas conversions.

businesses.name: Savvygas ltd
businesses.known_for: Plumbing and gasfitting company handling everything from leaking taps to major renovations; serves New Plymouth, Stratford and South Taranaki.
